Mini Golf
Custom
This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Midsummer Cawnival
Contents
1 Course Wall
2 Pop-up Blocker
3 Spin Plate
4 Mini Worm Hole
5 Springboard
6 Obstacle
Course Wall[edit | edit source]
Course Wall
"Of course, a course needs walls."
1x1
1x2
2x1
2x2
line
diagonal
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golf_shape"
“There's no getting around that.”
–Wilson
“Boundaries mean nothing to me.”
–Willow
“Is strong enough to keep Wolfgang ball in?”
–Wolfgang
“So that the ball doesn't escape.”
–Wendy
“BALL CONTAINMENT SYSTEM”
–WX-78
“It designates the play area.”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll keep the ball from wandering off.”
–Woodie
“It reminds lesser players where the world ends.”
–Maxwell
“It keeps the field öf battle cöntained.”
–Wigfrid
“We have to stay inside the fence to play.”
–Webber
“Simple, it holds the course together.”
–Warly
“Keep friend inside”
–Wormwood
“Easier than chasin' balls all day.”
–Winona
“A tidy frame for a bounded game!”
–Wortox
“Stop ball from running away... good fence.”
–Wurt
“That will keep the ball from rolling off... and you too, Woby!”
–Walter
“It keeps things contained.”
–Wanda
Pop-up Blocker[edit | edit source]
Pop-up Blocker
Red
Blue
"It keeps popping up!"
Red
Blue
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golfprop_movingwall_red"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_movingwall_blue"
“The obstacle has its ups and downs.”
–Wilson
“It's testing my patience.”
–Willow
“Little up and down wall is frustrating Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“I've known down more than up.”
–Wendy
“PATTERN DETECTED, TIMING CRITICAL”
–WX-78
“A wall that rises and falls at set intervals.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just need to time it right.”
–Woodie
“Up or down? Make up your mind!”
–Maxwell
“Rise and fall as thöu wilt, I shall still prevail!”
–Wigfrid
“We have to time it juuuuust right.”
–Webber
“Like a nightmare soufflé.”
–Warly
“Up friend, down friend”
–Wormwood
“Goes up, goes down. Simple enough.”
–Winona
“The retracting is so distracting!”
–Wortox
“Wait for right time, then go fast!”
–Wurt
“Bark when it goes down, Woby!”
–Walter
“It's really a matter of timing.”
–Wanda
Spin Plate[edit | edit source]
Medium Spin Plate
Clockwise
Counter Clockwise
"Put a spin on it."
Clockwise
Counter Clockwise
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golfprop_mediumspinner_cw"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_mediumspinner_ccw"
Small Spin Plate
Clockwise
Counter Clockwise
"Put a little spin on it."
Clockwise
Counter Clockwise
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golfprop_smallspinner_cw"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_smallspinner_ccw"
“It's really turning things around.”
–Wilson
“Ugh, it's making me dizzy!”
–Willow
“Make Wolfgang dizzy.”
–Wolfgang
“It exists to interfere.”
–Wendy
“ANGULAR MOTION SYSTEM FOR INCREASED CHAOS”
–WX-78
“Its behavior is simple to describe, but intentionally difficult to accommodate.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's just a spinning headache.”
–Woodie
“Reminds me of that accursed thing.”
–Maxwell
“Restless disc öf chaös!”
–Wigfrid
“Ooooh! Spinny fun!”
–Webber
“It would make a real mess of dinner!”
–Warly
“Dizzy friend”
–Wormwood
“Don't stare at it too long.”
–Winona
“Use the spin for a skillful win!”
–Wortox
“Wheeeeee!”
–Wurt
“Let's take it for a spin!”
–Walter
“Always in motion, like the hands of time.”
–Wanda
Mini Worm Hole[edit | edit source]
Mini Worm Hole
Normal
Sick
NormalSick
It eats up and spits out golf balls.
It lives to transport your golf ball once only!
Normal
Sick
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golfprop_wormhole"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_wormhole_limited"
“I wish I could study how the two ends connect, but it might be gross.”
–Wilson
“Gross! Better not drool all over my ball!”
–Willow
“Where will it send little ball?”
–Wolfgang
“Will the ball end up in a better place?”
–Wendy
“SYSTEM BYPASSES COURSE STRUCTURE”
–WX-78
“It connects to another on the course, enabling instantaneous transfer between them.”
–Wickerbottom
“I don't trust it one bit.”
–Woodie
“Careful where you send my ball.”
–Maxwell
“Thöu mayst whisk my ball away, but nöt mine resölve!”
–Wigfrid
“Just like the big one, but for golf balls!”
–Webber
“It has fast digestion.”
–Warly
“Eat ball friend?”
–Wormwood
“Here goes nothin'...”
–Winona
“Where the ball goes? No one knows!”
–Wortox
“Florp! Make ball disappear... then pop out somewhere else!”
–Wurt
“Maybe it's a shortcut!”
–Walter
“I do love a shortcut... even if I'm not sure where it leads.”
–Wanda
Springboard[edit | edit source]
Mini Worm Hole
Upward
Upward Once
Direct
Direct Once
UpwardUpward OnceDirectDirect Once
It'll spring into action, again and again!
Launch served once per game.
It'll spring into action, again and again!
Launch served once per game.
Upward
Upward Once
Direct
Direct Once
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golfprop_spring_nofaced"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_spring_nofaced_onetime"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_spring"
"carnivalgame_golfprop_spring_onetime"
“And they say there's no such thing as a free launch!”
–Wilson
“Boing! Bye!”
–Willow
“Bouncy bouncy little ball!”
–Wolfgang
“Gravity remains inevitable.”
–Wendy
“PATH OVERRIDE DEVICE”
–WX-78
“A controlled propulsion platform using stored mechanical energy.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not much control here.”
–Woodie
“It flings the ball skyward, sparing it the indignity of rolling.”
–Maxwell
“Upward and önward!”
–Wigfrid
“It makes the ball jump!”
–Webber
“I wonder if it can flip crepes.”
–Warly
“Bye ball friend!”
–Wormwood
“Pop goes the golf ball.”
–Winona
“I'm dying to send the ball flying!”
–Wortox
“Make ball jump!”
–Wurt
“Launch time! Not lunch time, Woby!”
–Walter
“It turns careful planning into a single irreversible event.”
–Wanda
Obstacle[edit | edit source]
Obstacle

Rose
Ham Bat
Corn
Mushroom
Bearger

CarrotRoseHam BatCornMushroomBeargerDeerclopsSpiderDragonflyTentacle
A Bunnyman favorite.
A thorn in your side.
Ball, meat obstacle.
No need for a corny description.
It's just for fungi!
It bears a strong resemblance.
More obstructive than destructive.
Hated by almost everyone.
It will still get you heated.
Not deadly, but still annoying.
Carrot
Rose
Ham Bat
Corn
Mushroom
Bearger
Deerclops
Spider
Dragonfly
Tentacle
Crafting
Filters
Miscellaneous
"carnivalgame_golfprop_cutout[1]-[10]"
“It's just in the way.”
–Wilson
“It's all firewood as far as I'm concerned.”
–Willow
“Get out of Wolfgang way!”
–Wolfgang
“A lifeless likeness.”
–Wendy
“FUNCTION: INTERRUPT BALL TRAJECTORY, IRRITATE ME”
–WX-78
“It is both aesthetic marker and deliberate impediment to linear play.”
–Wickerbottom
“I should just chop that down.”
–Woodie
“Must you always be in my way?”
–Maxwell
“They stand as memöries made manifest in timber.”
–Wigfrid
“Excuse us!”
–Webber
“Aren't you quite the unwelcome guest!”
–Warly
“Fake friend?”
–Wormwood
“You're just gonna stand there all day, aintcha?”
–Winona
“It mocks me as it blocks me!”
–Wortox
“Me make ball go around it.”
–Wurt
“Wow, neat carving!”
–Walter
“They serve no purpose but to slow my progress.”
–Wanda
